hero.subtitle: Placed a freelancer, an indie, a company? Plugcut formalizes and executes the private commission they owe you: a percentage of the daily rate, over time. Discreetly, with a real contract.
hero.note: The relationship already exists. Plugcut secures the agreement, not the intro.

items: The project lead placing a freelancer
The baker with a developer buddy
The ex-colleague handing you a client
The consultant opening their address book

how.title: From intro to payout, on a single rail.

steps.title: Create the deal
steps.desc: Who placed whom, at which client. Kept discreet from the end client.

steps.title: Set the commission
steps.desc: A percentage of the day rate, over a duration. For example 10% over 12 months.

steps.title: Two-sided acceptance
steps.desc: Both parties accept the terms. That is your attribution proof, timestamped and sealed.

steps.title: Contract generated
steps.desc: The written agreement between referrer and placed person, ready to sign.

steps.title: Recurring collection
steps.desc: Your cut is computed and tracked against the day rate, month after month.

pillars.title: What Plugcut secures, where a handshake falls short.

items.title: A real contract
items.desc: The written agreement between you and the placed person. Not a promise, a document.

items.title: Attribution proof
items.desc: Who introduced whom, timestamped and sealed by fingerprint. Your protection in a dispute.

items.title: Recurring collection
items.desc: Your commission pulled automatically from the day rate, month after month, no chasing.

items.title: Total discretion
items.desc: The end client sees nothing. The agreement stays strictly between the two of you.

calc.title: What's your intro worth?
calc.subtitle: Estimate your cut over the duration. The real figure follows the days actually billed.
calc.disclaimer: Indicative estimate. The final figure is based on the days actually billed by the placed person.

items.q: Why not just shake hands and send an invoice?
items.a: Because on 10% of a day rate for a year, the referrer fears being forgotten, and the placed person wants a clean, discreet frame. Plugcut sells trust and execution of the deal, not the intro.
The placed person, never the end client. Privately, discreetly.
No. The relationship already exists offline. We formalize and track the agreement. We do not do matching.
Anyone. A project lead, a developer, or someone entirely outside tech who knows the right person.

cta.title: Your network has value. Cash it in.
cta.subtitle: Put your next referral on a clean, discreet, contractual rail.

footer.tagline: The rail for referral commissions, person to person.
